sections.paragraph:
Βερνίκη, ης, ἡ (colloq. abbreviation IG III, 2618, 1; PPetr III, 1 II, 7; PTebt 407, 14 for Βερενίκη [s. Gignac I 306]; Tat. 10, 1; Polyaenus 8, 50; OGI 263, 2; 717, 6; Sb 307, 1; 438, 2; s. also Preisigke, Namenbuch; Acta Pilati 7=ASyn. 95, 90) Bernice, daughter of Agrippa I and sister of Agrippa II and Drusilla, b. 28, d. after 79 a.d.. She lived in marital relations w. various men, incl. her brother Agrippa. Both visited Festus in Caesarea Ac 25:13, 23; 26:30. Chief sources: Joseph., index Niese; Tacit., Hist. 2, 2 and 81; Sueton., Tit. 7; Juvenal, Sat. 6, 156–60; OGI 428, 3.—Schürer I 450f; 474–76; 479; 485; 571f; Wilcken, Pauly-W. III 287ff; MWahl, De Regina Berenice 1893; EMireaux, La reine Bérénice ’51; Boffo, Iscrizioni p. 338 (lit.); Hemer, Acts 173; 238.—M-M.

colloq. colloq. = colloquial

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

Gignac Gignac = FG., Grammar of Greek Papyri—Lists 4, 6

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Preisigke, Namenbuch Preisigke, Namenbuch = Namenbuch 1922

Acta Pilati Acta Pilati —List 5

ASyn. ASyn. = KAland, Synopsis Quattuor Evangeliorum13—Lists 1, 6

incl. incl. = including

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

Hist.

Hist. (after a personal name)=historicus, historian

hist. = historian, historical

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Boffo, Iscrizioni Boffo, Iscrizioni = LB., Iscrizioni greche e latine—List 3

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Hemer, Acts Hemer, Acts = CH., The Book of Acts in the Setting of Hellenistic History—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 174
